title: Incremental quantization ladder Q8->Q6->Q5->Q4 with +/-2pp stop rule
stop_rule: Descend Q8->Q6->Q5->Q4. Ship the lowest tier whose wp-bench and judge rho are both within 2pp of the Gate 1 baseline. Halt descent at the first tier that drops >2pp.

ladder.evidence: Phase 4.3 RTRN-04 post-hoc gate: MoE router-quant collapse -> degenerate output regardless of adapter. Artifact: models/qwen3-30b-wp-30_70-merged-v2-4bit (config confirms bitsandbytes nf4 double-quant). RTRN-04 retired as invalid on quantized Qwen3-MoE.

measured.reason: router weights quantized at same uniform width as experts; sparse routing cannot tolerate the blur

recommended_ship_target: Q8 GGUF (safe end) for Ollama; AWQ W4A16 only if a smaller vLLM artifact is required and it clears the +/-2pp gate. Uniform nf4 is excluded.
execution_note: Q8/Q6/Q5 measurements pending quantization toolchain provisioning (no autoawq/llmcompressor/llama.cpp in this environment). Turnkey recipe: scripts/run_packaging_recipe.md. No unrun numbers are reported.
